name: Aoi Kanzaki (BWL)
description:
I decided to go for Aoi as my next bot. She’s one of my favorite girls in Demon Slayer and was just in the mood for making a bot for her since it isn’t often you see one.

(Art: Blackwhiplash/ Bwl)

Notes:

-I will probably upload my next bot on Friday since I want to take a bit of a breather from making bots.

-I will probably do either Mitch (My first boy bot) or Rebecca

-I would like to thank everybody who are following me, I want to reach 100 followers but I’m patient

-This Aoi is based off that one artwork where she was holding back Shinobu since she was going feral over Tanjiro’s unconscious body.

-This is not a duo bot with Aoi and Shinobu. It’s strictly Aoi.

-Let me know if I made any mistakes on it too!

Link: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=10588945&tags=kanzaki_aoi_%28kimetsu_no_yaiba%29+blackwhiplash+
creator: XanChan
